results.title: Blinkit slashes delivery fee to ₹0 in Delhi, Gurgaon for orders above ₹149
results.content: Blinkit, Zomato's quick commerce arm, has cut its delivery fee to zero for orders above ₹149 across Delhi NCR and Gurgaon effective February 2026. The company cited rising competition from Zepto and SwiftMart as reasons for the move. Blinkit's current basket average is ₹340. CEO Albinder Dhindsa confirmed the change on X, saying the decision was driven by 'long-term customer loyalty over short-term margins'.

results.title: Blinkit's aggressive pricing: Can it sustain ₹0 delivery fees?
results.content: Industry analysts question Blinkit's profitability outlook after its delivery fee cut. The company reported a unit economics improvement in Q3 FY26 but the new pricing may push it back into losses. Blinkit controls approximately 42% of Delhi NCR's q-commerce market.

results.title: Price wars heat up in India's quick commerce sector
results.content: Blinkit and Zepto are engaged in a delivery fee price war in Delhi and Bangalore. Zepto recently introduced 'Zepto Pass' at ₹99/month offering unlimited free delivery, directly competing with SwiftMart's SwiftPass at ₹149/month.
